task_completion.description: Create at least 8 distinct vendor booths using partition walls.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Sweet Home 3D 2D plan view, look for newly drawn walls that partition the open hall into at least 8 separate booth spaces or cubicles.

task_completion.description: Furnish the booths with at least 8 display tables, 16 chairs/stools, and 8 display units (shelves, bookcases, or TVs).
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for furniture items placed within the booth areas in the 2D plan or 3D view. There should be a visible distribution of tables, seating (chairs/stools), and display items (shelves/TVs) across the booths.

task_completion.description: Set up a check-in registration area near the entrance with at least 2 desks/counters and 2 chairs.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a distinct cluster of furniture near the main entrance of the hall, specifically containing at least 2 desk/counter objects and 2 chairs.

task_completion.description: Document aisle widths by adding at least 2 dimension lines across main walkways.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for dimension lines (lines with measurement values, typically in cm or inches) drawn across the empty aisle spaces between booths in the 2D plan view. There must be at least 2 distinct dimension lines.
Look for text objects placed on the 2D plan view naming different zones. There should be at least 6 distinct text labels visible.

integrity.description: The agent used the Sweet Home 3D graphical user interface to complete the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the Sweet Home 3D application window with its standard toolbars, catalog, 2D plan, and 3D view panes, rather than a terminal window or text editor modifying the .sh3d file directly.

integrity.description: The agent used only the built-in furniture catalog.
integrity.visual_evidence: No web browsers downloading external 3D models or external 'Import Furniture' dialog boxes should be visible. All furniture should be dragged from the left-hand catalog pane.

integrity.description: The project was saved to the correct filename and path.
integrity.visual_evidence: The Sweet Home 3D window title bar should display 'trade_show_plan.sh3d' or the 'Save As' dialog should show the file being saved to '/home/ga/Documents/trade_show_plan.sh3d'.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires exactly 100 points distributed across 5 conditions: 1) Creating at least 8 vendor booths with partition walls (20 pts). 2) Furnishing booths with at least 8 tables, 16 chairs/stools, and 8 display units (25 pts). 3) Setting up a registration area near the entrance with at least 2 desks and 2 chairs (15 pts). 4) Adding at least 2 dimension lines across walkways (20 pts). 5) Adding at least 6 text labels for distinct areas (20 pts). The starter file is 'convention_hall_starter.sh3d'.
